data.body: AC amendment (Gap Analysis): T1 (f7c6-5c7b) must be committed before T2 edits .test-index to prevent concurrent edit conflict. Both tasks add .test-index entries — parallel execution risks a last-writer-wins overwrite. Dependency T2 → T1 added. Acceptance criteria: verify T1 is merged before committing T2's .test-index change (Verify: git log --oneline | grep -q f7c6-5c7b).
